numerics.notes: No simulations or new numerical fits were performed for this manuscript.

code.notes: No project code is required to reproduce the scientific claims because the manuscript is a source-level comparative audit.

inputs: Five verified anchor papers listed in manuscript/references.bib
manual_checks: Citation-to-title matching against arXiv and published records
Consistency check that all source-backed results remain unchanged
Dimensional and limiting-case audit of all retained schematic equations
known_limits: The manuscript makes no new derivational claim.
The manuscript does not verify R-01-DIAGNOSTIC-SPLIT beyond keeping it explicitly provisional.
Equation checks are limited to schematic definitions because the source project contains no quantitative derivation artifact.
